title: POLAND enforcement action against Election Committee of Karol Nawrocki (8,470)
summary: Insufficient legal basis for data processing The Polish DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 8,470 on the Election Committee of Karol Nawrocki. The controller published documents relating to a political affair concerning the purchase of real estate, which contained personal data that could have been pseudonymised or redacted.
